basic_details.job_title: TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 10 State, Block Resource Person and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Chengalpattu
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 25 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: Preference will be given to women and SHG members. Ex-BRPs will be given priority.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline, Minimum 3 years experience in SHG/CBOs, Proficiency in Tamil and English, Computer knowledge in MS Word and Excel
qualification.details: State Resource Person (SRP): Any Graduate with a minimum of 3 years of experience in SHG/Community Based Organizations or as a BRP. Must have computer knowledge in MS Word and Excel, and proficiency in Tamil and English. District Resource Person (DRP): Any Graduate with a minimum of 4 years of experience in SHG/Community Based Organizations. Must have computer knowledge in MS Word and Excel, and proficiency in Tamil and English. Block Resource Person (BRP): Any Graduate with a minimum of 3 years of experience in SHG/Community Based Organizations. Must have computer knowledge in MS Word and Excel, and proficiency in Tamil and English.

salary_details.details: State Resource Person (SRP): Rs. 25,000/- Per Month District Resource Person (DRP): Rs. 18,000/- Per Month Block Resource Person (BRP): Rs. 10,500/- Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TNSRLM Chengalpattu Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://tncdw.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 is 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the State/District/Block Resource Person posts?
faq.answer: A total of 10 vacancies are available for the State/District/Block Resource Person posts in the Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission Chengalpattu.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for all the posts is a Graduate degree in any discipline. Specific experience requirements vary for each post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the TNSRLM Chengalpattu recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for all the posts is between 25 years and 45 years. Age relaxation might be applicable as per government norms, with preference given to women and SHG members.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 includes a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post. State Resource Person (SRP) will receive Rs. 25,000/- per month, District Resource Person (DRP) will receive Rs. 18,000/- per month, and Block Resource Person (BRP) will receive Rs. 10,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the TNSRLM Chengalpattu Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as instructed in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as a photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihoods Mission, which is https://tncdw.org.
